creator: ajk@iu.edu
text:
Version 8.3d of the console server has been released by ksb, and
I have upgraded the port to accomadate it.  I realized that I should
have submitted my first upgrade as a diff against the current
version of the port that you maintain.  I have done that with this
upgrade.  The new port relies on devel/msrc0 and devel/mkcmd, which
have already been committed.

Andrew J. Korty, Lead Security Engineer
Office of the Vice President of Information Technology
Indiana University
